description_long: This is a modern, freestanding cabinet or shelving unit with a dark wood frame and a combination of open and closed storage spaces. The upper section features two rectangular drawers with light-colored fronts and small square handles, alongside an open shelf area. The lower section includes a set of four small drawers on the left, a large sliding door with a frosted or white panel in the center, and a wooden panel on the right. The legs are short and slightly splayed, giving the piece a mid-century modern aesthetic. The surfaces appear smooth and the construction is solid, with a mix of wood and possibly laminate or glass materials. The overall design is functional and stylish, suitable for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A modern, dark wood cabinet with multiple drawers, sliding doors, and open shelving, featuring both light and dark panel accents. Its design is sleek and functional, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all drawers, sliding door, and open shelving with visible handles and panel details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, dark wood panel with no visible drawers or openings.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing a large wooden panel and the upper light-colored drawer fronts, with no visible handles or open shelving.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a solid, dark wood panel with no features.
